SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOUSSAINT, JEANNINE AKA J/LOUISE & TOUSSAINT CARON
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-08-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-12-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CASE MEDIATED. IF NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOUSSAINT, JEANNINE AKA J/LOUISE & TOUSSAINT CARON NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. SETTLEMENT PRESUMABLY COMPLETED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
